summary: Tested new Job Discovery system + new pricing tiers (Free/Basic/Premium/Hero ₹0/79/119/199). 12/12 new backend pytest cases pass. Frontend Pricing page renders all four plan cards with correct prices + comparison table. Job Discovery page renders, filters bar works, /api/jobs/discover returns 5 real jobs for a fresh free user (correctly capped at the daily quota of 5), save tab works, and Apply buttons are correctly wrapped in <a target=_blank> pointing to real LinkedIn/Naukri/Wellfound/Indeed/Internshala URLs. Daily quota 402 enforcement verified — a second /discover after the cap returns 402 'Daily job recommendation limit reached'.

minor.issue: Clearbit logo for AI-generated companies sometimes 404s — e.g. ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED for fabricated company domains. Cosmetic only; UI falls back to initial avatar gracefully.

action_items: Optional: Replace Clearbit-direct logo URLs with a server-side fallback (e.g. generated initial avatar) for company domains that don't resolve, to silence ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED console noise.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_jobs.discover: filtering by remote_filter is delegated to the LLM via prompt only — there is no post-AI filter to drop non-matching remote_type jobs. If GPT-5.2 ignores the rule, mixed types may persist. Consider filtering raw_jobs by remote_type == body.remote_type when remote_type != 'any' before inserting.

routes_jobs.discover: when LLM returns 0 jobs, raises 502 but does NOT roll back/skip quota; since we count from `jobs_col`, no row was inserted so quota is unaffected — fine. Just confirm no _log_usage call happens before this point (currently it doesn't, OK).
routes_jobs.usage: 'unlimited' flag uses cap >= 1000 — correct since Hero plan jobs_per_day is 100000.
models.PLANS: Free plan sources are only ['wellfound','internshala']; LLM is instructed to use ALLOWED SOURCES, and code clamps invalid sources to plan.sources[0] — defensive and correct.
Apply URL deep-linking uses search/keyword URLs (not job-id-specific) which is the intended behavior — they always land on a live search results page even for AI-fabricated job titles. Good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on Pricing + Job Discovery critical flows

test_credentials: Admin: admin@leomote.ai / Admin@2026 (Hero plan, unlimited). Fresh free users created on-the-fly via /api/auth/signup with TEST_quota_* / TEST_ui_* prefixes for quota + UI testing.
seed_data_creation: Per-run fresh free users created for daily-quota validation. Discover persists up to 5 jobs/user/day; safe to leave behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run new regression: `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_jobs_and_pricing.py -v`. This suite creates a fresh free user per module so re-running the whole module works idempotently — it does not rely on cleanup of prior runs. The 402 quota test depends on the first /discover call returning ≥1 job; if the AI is rate-limited (502) the quota follow-up auto-skips via pytest.skip. Frontend uses data-testid plan-card-{id}, subscribe-{id}, pricing-header, comparison-table on Pricing; and jobs-page, job-role/location/remote/exp/resume/startup/discover, tab-{discover|saved|all}, job-{id}, save-{id}, apply-{id}, jobs-error on Job Discovery — all confirmed present.
rca of the issue: No bugs found this iteration. Previous iteration's LLM-budget 500 on /api/ai/keywords was not retested here (out of scope). New Job Discovery feature works end-to-end with real GPT-5.2 + correct quota enforcement + correct deep-link Apply URLs.
